title: Mobs are Friends
description: Ever wanted to be able to play in a world with hostile mobs on, but choose when to fight? Now you can! With Mobs are Friends, all hostile mobs will either be fully passive, or passive until hit.
body:
**Introducing Mobs are Friends: Unleash the Power of Choice in Your Minecraft World!**

Have you ever wanted to be able to play in a world with hostile mobs on, but choose when to fight? Now you can! With Mobs are Friends, all hostile mobs will either be fully passive or neutral until hit, just like spiders do in the day.

## Features to Amplify Your Gameplay

* Encounter Zombies, Skeletons, Creepers, Spiders, and more, all in a neutral state until provoked - just like the spiders during the day!
* Feel secure around Wardens as they will remain passive, granting you the freedom to explore their realm without constant danger.
* Face the true might of the Ender Dragon and Wither, as you can only get them deliberately when you are ready to take on their formidable power.

## Embrace the Adventure, Unleash the Excitement

Mobs are Friends revolutionizes the way you play Minecraft by empowering you to set the pace of your adventures. No longer bound by the constant onslaught of hostile mobs, but without the need to remove them all for a completely peaceful mode, you can now savor the world's beauty, gather resources, and plan your strategies without undue stress.

## Seamless Integration

Rest assured, Mobs are Friends seamlessly integrates into your game without altering any other core mechanics or introducing any unexpected side effects. You get to enjoy the best of both worlds: a thrilling challenge when you seek it, and a peaceful environment when you desire to explore undisturbed.

Ready to take control of your Minecraft destiny? Embrace the power of choice with Mobs are Friends and shape your own path in this blocky universe. Download now and experience Minecraft like never before!

## Download

* [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mobs-are-friends)
* [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobs-are-friends)

## Support

For help and support, please use the [GitHub Issue Tracker](https://github.com/KatCodesMods/Mobs-Are-Friends/issues) and/or join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/DvURCh7nXV). We look forward to seeing you there!
